title: The Romanticism of Code
description: Software is often treated as machinery, but code is also architecture, language, psychology, and philosophy. A reflection on software creation as artistic and cognitive expression.

title: Tomorrow Has Teeth
description: Speculative thoughts on emerging intelligence, machine agency, and the subtle dangers hidden beneath technological acceleration.

title: Echoes Beyond the Simulation
description: A speculative science-fiction fragment exploring memory, artificial consciousness, and the psychological architecture of synthetic worlds.
